positive: A whimsical, highly detailed, symmetrical celestial meadow scene suitable for an apparel print. The design must feature stylized bioluminescent elements: glowing abstract constellations, crystalline floating spores, and stylized, ethereal flora (like glowing moons and dream-spun vines). The color palette is limited to deep midnight indigo, vibrant electric teal, and strong, radiant gold accents. Emphasis on strong, clean silhouettes and intricate linework, giving a modern etched or vector art aesthetic. Composition must be perfectly balanced and visually centered. Cinematic, high-contrast volumetric lighting that makes the glowing elements pop against the dark background.
negative: text, watermark, signature, logo, blurry, grain, low detail, bad anatomy, extra limbs, malformed, noisy, jpeg artifacts, sketch, grayscale, photorealistic, messy, clutter
